detail.long_description: Akazora is a boutique development situated in the heart of the village of Hirafu, offering modern studio, 1 bedroom and 2 bedroom apartments. A nearby resort ski shuttle stop will take you around the village and ski field, or a short 7 minute walk will bring you to the closest ski lift. Enjoy close access to restaurants, onsen and more.
detail.client_long_description: Akazora Niseko is a stunning development in the heart of Niseko Hirafu village. It is just steps away from popular restaurants and bars, and is conveniently located next to a ski shuttle stop. Akazora Niskeo offers modern, fully furnished Studio, One Bedroom and Two Bedroom apartments, with concierge.
